title: Command Packaging, Build Identity, Cross-Platform Behavior, and Distribution · Runtime Contract: Pokedex Go Version Build Identity
summary: The binary works only from the repository root, embeds no version identity, writes beside itself, assumes Unix signals and paths, and ships an untested archive from a dirty tree. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go version build identity increment in reproducible cross-platform Go Pokedex artifact. Learners progress through pred…
